Authors: Z. Ahmed, S. Khan, M. Ali
Title: Mitigating Bias in AI Model Using Explainable AI in Terms of Hiring Process
Key Findings: XAI improves transparency in bias detection
Gap / Limitation: Single dataset only; no cross-dataset validation

Authors: R. Patel, L. Chen, A. Kumar
Title: Ethical Challenges and Bias in Real-World AI: A Fairness-Oriented Approach to Resume Screening
Key Findings: Fairness constraints improve equity with modest accuracy loss
Gap / Limitation: Limited to resume text; no reweighting approach

Title: Landmark AI Framework Sets New Standard for Tackling Algorithmic Bias
Amazon Scraps Secret AI Recruiting Tool That Showed Bias Against Women
Key Findings: Training on biased historical data causes gender discrimination
Gap / Limitation: Descriptive case study; no mitigation solution

Authors: S. Barocas, M. Hardt, A. Narayanan
Title: Fairness and Machine Learning: Limitations and Opportunities
Fairness Metrics: Demographic Parity, Equalized Odds, Calibration, Individual Fairness
Key Findings: Multiple fairness criteria are often mutually incompatible

Authors: N. Mehrabi, F. Morstatter, N. Saxena, K. Lerman, A. Galstyan
Title: A Survey on Bias and Fairness in Machine Learning
Key Findings: Comprehensive taxonomy of bias sources and mitigation strategies
Gap / Limitation: Survey paper; no new empirical results

Authors: R. K. E. Bellamy et al.
Title: AI Fairness 360: An Extensible Toolkit for Detecting and Mitigating Algorithmic Bias
Fairness Metrics: Disparate Impact, Statistical Parity, Equal Opportunity
Key Findings: Reweighting and other pre-processing techniques effective

Title: Fair Prediction with Disparate Impact: A Study of Bias in Recidivism Prediction Instruments
Key Findings: Calibration and error rate balance cannot hold simultaneously (impossibility)
Gap / Limitation: Theoretical result; does not propose mitigation

Title: The Measure and Mismeasure of Fairness: A Critical Review of Fair Machine Learning
Key Findings: Argues for context-specific fairness metric selection

Title: Data Preprocessing Techniques for Classification Without Discrimination
Key Findings: Reweighting is effective and model-agnostic pre-processing
Gap / Limitation: Tested on census data only; not hiring-specific

Authors: C. Dwork, M. Hardt, T. Pitassi, O. Reingold, R. Zemel
Title: Fairness Through Awareness
Key Findings: Similar individuals should receive similar outcomes
Gap / Limitation: Requires distance metric definition; hard to operationalize

Authors: S. A. Friedler, C. Scheidegger, S. Venkatasubramanian et al.
Title: A Comparative Study of Fairness-Enhancing Interventions in Machine Learning
Key Findings: No single intervention dominates across all metrics and datasets
Gap / Limitation: Limited to tabular data; no hiring-specific datasets
